widgets_values: A close-up portrait of a young woman
Get more from Acity on Patreon.jpg

The image is a full-length portrait of a young woman posing in a black outfit. She is standing in front of a white wall with a black floor and a black pillar on the left side. The woman is wearing a long-sleeved black crop top with a deep V-neckline and a mini skirt that falls below her knees. She has long dark hair styled in loose waves and is wearing black high heels with a pointed toe. Her body is angled slightly to the side and she is looking directly at the camera with a confident expression.
